issue.headline: The Email Compiler Renaissance
issue.previewText: How modern tooling is transforming email development in 2026

articles.title: Why Tailwind in Email is Finally Possible
articles.summary: A deep look at how compile-time CSS expansion solves the inlining problem that blocked Tailwind from email for years.

articles.title: How Email Compilers Handle Outlook in 2026
articles.summary: A look at how modern email compilers approach Outlook's quirks — VML fallbacks, conditional comments, and the trade-offs each one makes.

articles.title: The State of Dark Mode in Email
articles.summary: Coverage has crossed 60% in Gmail iOS. Here's what that means for how you should write dark mode CSS in 2026.

articles.title: Fluid Hybrid vs Fixed Width: Which Should You Use?
articles.summary: The definitive analysis of layout strategies across 18 email clients — with rendering comparisons and Lighthouse scores.
